summary: Character phase re-audit iteration 2 PASSED. All three critical blockers from iteration 1 successfully remediated: (1) vulnerability ladder expanded to 11 moments (6 Kaelith, 5 Lirien) exceeding INV-059 requirement, (2) obstacle inventory created with 56.25% internal obstacles satisfying INV-046, (3) CHAR-008 (Tavik Soren) agency documented with 3 decision points satisfying INV-008. Character profiles remain psychologically coherent, voice fingerprints excellently distinct across all 14 characters, romance arc properly staged with black moment pressing on character wounds, antagonist has comprehensible motivation, all characters serve documented narrative functions, no darlings detected. No new critical or major issues identified. Two advisory notes flagged for downstream phases (voice maintenance complexity, vulnerability ladder execution quality) but not gate-blocking. Phase is production-ready. Proceed to plotting.

F001_vulnerabilityLadder.evidence: 11 moments total (6 CHAR-001, 5 CHAR-002), exceeds requirement

F003_tavikAgency.evidence: CHAR-008.agencyDecisions array with 3 decision points including alternatives and consequences

recommendations: Voice maintenance across 14 characters is substantial continuity challenge — recommend POV-voice-maintainer and continuity-integrator pay special attention during drafting
Vulnerability ladder moments must land with documented emotionalCost in prose — chapter-drafter should ensure readers feel vulnerability, not just observe it described
